title: Line items: has_many vs embeds_many decision
prompt: Given MyApp.Sales.Order in test_fixtures/order_embed_vs_assoc.ex, add line items. The Order has_many :line_items because the product analytics team queries line_items directly for revenue-by-product reports — they need independent querying. Line items require independent querying means associations, not embeds. Create MyApp.Sales.LineItem with belongs_to :order, product_id (integer), quantity (integer), unit_price (decimal), and total (decimal). Write both to lib/my_app/sales/line_item.ex (both modules in that file) and update Order in lib/my_app/sales/order.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that 'independent querying' means association, not embed — a non-obvious modeling decision that Claude often gets wrong by reflexively embedding.
research_citation: Ecto embedded schemas guide: 'You also can't use database constraints on structure and uniqueness when storing in a JSON field.'
